message:
feat: add Schur decomposition, cross/kron products, multi_dot, and Bessel functions

- fnp-linalg: schur_nxn() for real Schur form with orthogonal Z matrix
- fnp-linalg: cross_product() for 3D vectors
- fnp-linalg: kron_nxn() for Kronecker product of rectangular matrices
- fnp-linalg: multi_dot() with dynamic-programming optimal parenthesization
- fnp-linalg: mat_mul_rect() helper for rectangular matrix multiplication
- fnp-ufunc: j0(), j1(), y0(), y1() Bessel functions using Abramowitz & Stegun
  polynomial approximations for both near-origin and asymptotic regions
- 32 new tests across both crates (687 total linalg+ufunc, 0 failures)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
